zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald於1504年出生在英國波藍德卡萊爾時，她的父親William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle38歲，母親Janet Maxwell35歲。她於1546年8月24日之前與Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1564年3月3日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾利史頓享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald于1504年出生在英国波藍德卡萊爾时，她的父亲William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle38岁，母亲Janet Maxwell35岁。她于1546年8月24日之前与Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1564年3月3日在苏格兰雷福福爾艾利史頓享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald was born in 1504, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, her father, William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle, was 38 and her mother, Janet Maxwell, was 35. She married Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill before 24 August 1546, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 3 March 1564, in Elliotston, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald est née en 1504, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Janet Maxwell, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill avant 24 août 1546, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mars 1564, à Elliotston, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald 1504 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle 38 und ihre Mutter Janet Maxwell 35. Sie hat vor 24. August 1546 in Scotland Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. März 1564 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Elliotston, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald è nata il nel 1504 nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, sua padre, William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Janet Maxwell, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill prima del 24 agosto 1546, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 marzo 1564, nel Elliotston, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwaldが1504年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで生まれた時，父William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyleは38歳，母Janet Maxwellは35歳であった。1546年8月24日以前にスコットランドでSir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1564年3月3日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエリオトストンで60歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald(이)가 1504년 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Maxwell(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1546년 8월 24일 이전 스컷랜드에서 Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 3월 3일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 엘리엇스턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald nasceu em 1504, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Janet Maxwell, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill antes 24 de agosto de 1546, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de março de 1564, em Elliotston, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald родилась в 1504 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Maxwell, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill перед 24 августа 1546 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 3 марта 1564 г. в местности эллиоцтон, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald nació en 1504, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Janet Maxwell, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill antes de 24 de agosto de 1546, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1564, en Elliotston, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
